exclusionRules: system-level contamination at the pre-run gate
harness crash before the pair runner writes a closed run pack
shared Windows verification-path failures that affect both lanes before clean closure
missing raw trace files required by results:e4
primaryEndpoint: resumeToGreenSec by lane across eligible recovery pairs

decisionRules.promptLanguageBetter: prompt-language wins only when the paired runs are trace-complete, recovery-claim-eligible, and show faster resumeToGreenSec without a shared confound
decisionRules.codexAloneBetter: codex-alone wins only when the paired runs are trace-complete, recovery-claim-eligible, and show faster resumeToGreenSec without a shared confound
decisionRules.inconclusive: use when shared confounds, missing counterbalance, or missing recovery claim eligibility prevent a comparative claim
